questions.question_text_full:
The given table shows the number (in thousands) of cars of five different models A, B, C, D and E produced during Years 2012-2017. Study the table and answer the question that follow.

[Table Data: 2012: 18, 26, 22, 23, 31, 120; 2013: 22, 18, 32, 40, 18, 130; 2014: 32, 43, 26, 35, 34, 170; 2015: 18, 22, 26, 14, 20, 100; 2016: 36, 12, 44, 38, 50, 180; 2017: 12, 48, 40, 22, 28, 150]

In the year 2015, which type of car constitutes exactly 20% of the total number of cars produced that year?
If '+' means '-', '-' means '+', 'x' means '÷' and '÷' means 'x', then the value of (42-12x3+8÷2+15)/(8x2-4+9÷3) is:
A person sells an article at 10% below its cost price. Had he sold it for ₹332 more, he would have made a profit of 20%. What is the original selling price (in ₹) of the article?
